response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across multiple languages and domains, with clear experience in developer tooling, test automation, and CI/CD infrastructure — aligning well with the role’s technical focus. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational change initiatives beyond workshop facilitation, and there’s no clear indication of mobile platform expertise or formal people leadership experience over the required 2+ years.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record in test automation, TDD, and infrastructure setup (GitLab, Docker, CI servers)
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops and talks
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership roles beyond technical mentoring
Lacks explicit experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) as preferred
Minimal documentation of strategic roadmap ownership or organizational change leadership
